response.justification: Bogdan brings 20 years of broad engineering experience and currently works on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at Google, which is directionally relevant, but the role demands director-level AI strategy thought leadership, enterprise advisory credibility, and a demonstrated track record of shaping AI product vision at scale — none of which are clearly evidenced; his AI work is recent, tooling-oriented, and lacks the strategic advisory depth this position requires.
strengths: 20+ years of diverse engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure — comfortably clears the 15-year minimum
Current Google role includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, showing genuine hands-on engagement with agentic AI workflows
Entrepreneurial profile with open-source platform founding, community workshops, and conference talks demonstrating a builder and knowledge-sharing mindset
concerns: No advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in an AI-related field, which is a preferred qualifier for this level of AI strategy seniority
AI involvement is recent (April 2025) and infrastructure-focused rather than strategic — no demonstrated history of shaping AI product direction or advising enterprise customers on AI adoption
No evidence of director-level influence, executive stakeholder engagement, or thought leadership that a principal-level AI strategy IC would need to show

key_factors.factor: AI strategy depth and track record
Years and breadth of engineering experience
Absence of advanced AI credentials or advisory history
